::: {.panel-tabset}

## amd64

```bash
curl -LO https://github.com/merlos/openme/releases/download/cli-v{{< var cli_version >}}/openme_{{< var cli_version >}}_amd64.deb
sudo dpkg -i openme_{{< var cli_version >}}_amd64.deb
```

## arm64

```bash
curl -LO https://github.com/merlos/openme/releases/download/cli-v{{< var cli_version >}}/openme_{{< var cli_version >}}_arm64.deb
sudo dpkg -i openme_{{< var cli_version >}}_arm64.deb
```

## armhf

```bash
curl -LO https://github.com/merlos/openme/releases/download/cli-v{{< var cli_version >}}/openme_{{< var cli_version >}}_armhf.deb
sudo dpkg -i openme_{{< var cli_version >}}_armhf.deb
```

## i386

```bash
curl -LO https://github.com/merlos/openme/releases/download/cli-v{{< var cli_version >}}/openme_{{< var cli_version >}}_i386.deb
sudo dpkg -i openme_{{< var cli_version >}}_i386.deb
```

## riscv64

```bash
curl -LO https://github.com/merlos/openme/releases/download/cli-v{{< var cli_version >}}/openme_{{< var cli_version >}}_riscv64.deb
sudo dpkg -i openme_{{< var cli_version >}}_riscv64.deb
```

:::
